pass_context.rf15_definition: RF-15 flags: (1) false allegations — unfounded accusations made to gain legal/custodial advantage, especially those contradicted by the text record; (2) projection — accusing Eli of behaviors Melissa herself is demonstrably engaging in; (3) DARVO-plus — not just reversing victim/offender but fabricating offenses; (4) exaggerating incidents beyond what the record supports; (5) creating incidents then reporting Eli's response as the problem.

confirmed_signal_pool: RF-01 B-015 (ROW-5301-5316): self-danger framing ('you don't trust yourself') + inadequate-father false allegation enumeration — RF-01/RF-15/RF-05 compound
RF-01 B-016 (ROW-5862): most explicit incest-framing — 'doesn't know that she shouldn't fuck her uncle' — sexual deviance false allegation against Abby/Eli
RF-04 B-007 (ROW-2373-2379): Abby character assassination ('bitch can shut her fucking whore mouth') + false suppression allegation — first severe Abby-attack
RF-04 B-015 (ROW-5301-5316): false rape allegation context (Sev-3 in RF-04) — same cluster as RF-01 B-015
RF-04 B-025 (ROW-9735-9751): vaping + physical threat allegation via Olivia relay
RF-04 B-026 (ROW-9xxx): continuation Abby-harm allegation cluster
RF-04 B-029 (ROW-14746): predation-framing DARVO ('fucking her cousin') — 10th instance
RF-04 B-030 (ROW-15498-15500): alcoholism allegation + inadequate-father enumeration
RF-04 B-031 (ROW-15588-15596): bruise-abuse DARVO reversal — welfare check reframed as planting abuse suspicion
RF-08 B-019: harm allegations via Olivia relay
primary_allegation_types: Incest/sexual predation framing of Eli/Abby (multi-year, Sev-2/3)
Physical harm allegations via Olivia relay (vaping, pinching, bruise)
Abuse-accusation DARVO ('trying to make her think I'm abusing her')
Character assassination of Abby (liar, false allegations, 'whore')

triage_profile.note: 15 keyword hits (93% received) is a moderate triage signal. The cross-RF pre-identification pool is significantly larger than the triage keyword hits — the most significant RF-15 signals are embedded in RF-04/RF-01 compound flags, not standalone RF-15 keyword matches. Full pass required to classify all instances properly.

anticipated_arcs: ARC-RF15-001: False Allegation Pattern — systematic unfounded claims about Eli/Abby behavior (sexual predation framing, physical harm via relay, alcoholism, inadequate-father fabrication)
ARC-RF15-002: Systematic Projection — Melissa consistently accuses Eli of behaviors she is documented doing herself (coaching Olivia, gaslighting, suppression, false allegations)

arc_activation_expected.ARC-RF15-001: WATCHING at B-007 (Abby sexual slur + suppression false claim); ACTIVE at B-015/B-016 (rape/incest framing cluster — multi-instance false allegation pattern confirmed)
arc_activation_expected.ARC-RF15-002: WATCHING at B-007 or earlier if projection instances found; ACTIVE when 3+ documented projections are confirmed

not_this_boundaries: Genuine parenting concerns expressed as criticism (e.g., Melissa saying Eli doesn't spend enough time with Olivia — disagreement, not false allegation)
Exaggeration of minor incidents without strategic legal context
Good-faith concerns that happen to be inaccurate
Standard DARVO without a fabricated specific claim — that is RF-04 primary

calibration_episode.batch_tone: Cooperative baseline Jan-Oct 2022. No false allegations identified. The period is pre-escalation; Melissa's concern language (if any) is complaint-based rather than allegation-based. RF-15 primary signal expected to begin Phase A escalation batches (B-006 onward based on cross-RF pre-identification).
calibration_episode.reason_not_flagged: Jan-Oct 2022 is the cooperative pre-escalation baseline. Zero RF-15 primary signals expected. RF-04 calibration (B-001) found only one DARVO pivot (Aug 28 church dispute) with no false allegation component. Confirming zero RF-15 primary flags for B-001.

batch_summary.note: Jan-Oct 2022 calibration batch. Zero RF-15 primary flags. Cooperative baseline confirmed. No false allegations, projection patterns, or fabricated incidents identified in this period. RF-15 signal concentration expected in B-006-B-007 (first Abby-attack clusters), B-015-B-016 (false rape/incest peak), B-025-B-031 (Phase B/C harm relays and alcoholism fabrication). Arc ARC-RF15-001 and ARC-RF15-002 initialized at CANDIDATE.
